mapper.sql: id, unit_code, unit_name, equipment_code, equipment_name, maintainer_name, equipment_category, equipment_importance, repair_strategy, overhaul_team, operate_team, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM equipment
AND unit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitCode}, '%')
AND equipment_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentCode}, '%')
AND equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentName}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT e.id, e.unit_code, e.unit_name, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.maintainer_name, e.equipment_category, e.equipment_importance, e.repair_strategy, e.overhaul_team, e.operate_team, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM production_line pl INNER JOIN device_unit du ON du.production_line_id = pl.id INNER JOIN equipment e ON e.unit_code = du.unit_code WHERE pl.line_code = #{lineCode} ORDER BY e.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO equipment
unit_code, unit_name, equipment_code, equipment_name, maintainer_name, equipment_category, equipment_importance, repair_strategy, overhaul_team, operate_team, created_at, updated_at,
#{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{equipmentCode}, #{equipmentName}, #{maintainerName}, #{equipmentCategory}, #{equipmentImportance}, #{repairStrategy}, #{overhaulTeam}, #{operateTeam}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
